titleStmt.title: SII 26.486: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 486. (A.R. No. 462 of 1909.) ŚUTTAMALLI, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: South and west walls of the Saundararāja-perumāḷ temple.
This inscription is much damaged and fragmentary. It contains portions of the king's praśasti commencing with Pūmaruviya tirumaḍandaiyum, etc. Other details are not clear.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tayum puyattiruppa nāmaruviya kalaimaṭantaiyañ ceyamaṭantaiyum nilañ ciṟappa koḷunta ciṉappuliyuṅ koṭuñcilaiyuṅ kuḷaintoḷippa vā
tu ceṅkol naṭappa Oru kuṭai niḻali lirunilaṅkuḷira muvakaittamiḻu muṟaimaiyil viḷaṅka nālvakai vetamu naviṉṟuṭaṉ vaḷara Aiyvakai veḻviyu
miyaluṭaṉ parava yeṇṭicaiyaḷavuñ cakkarañ cella koṅkaṇar kaliṅkar kocalar māḷuvar ciṅkaḷar teliṅkar ciṉar kuccarar villavar makatarvi
ṉ ṉoruvar muṟai muṟai kaṭava tantiṟai nṟaiñ cayilaṅ koḷimaṇimuṭi yintiraṉ pūṭṭiya polaṉ katirāramārviṉil poliya
ṉi cūḻnāṭṭuppuliyāṉai poykalakkaḷḷicūḻnāṭṭu kayalāṉai kayvaḷara veñciṉa vevuḷiyum veḻamum parappit tañcaiyu muṟantaiyuñ cen
kkūṭamumāmatiḷuṅ kopuramumāṭaraṅkum māṭamāḷikaiyu maṇṭapaṅkaḷum palaviṭittut toḻutuvantaṭaiyā nirupartan tokaiyar Aḻu
cuccempiya tteviyarai veḷameṟṟu paiymapoṉ ppāṇṇu
ṇṭapattu virā ceytu pukaḻvirittu viḷaṅkiya maṇiyaṇi virasiṅhāsanattu vala
kuḻaiyarivaiyar ttu Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrīkomāṟapaṉmarāṉa
mithuṉa nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattuc catutteciyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattunāḷ
ṇṇakaremperumāṉ maṇṭalattu mulaikkaṇṇaṉ paṟpaṉāpaṉāṉa śrīpaṟmaṉābhadāsan I
kkile tiruviḷakku E Accu muṉṟe mukkāl Ivvaccu muṉṟe mukkālum muṉpu Iṉṉāyaṉā
kaikkoṇṭu vāykkālukku kiḻakku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu vitikku vaṭakku yiṟ vaṭakkaṭai
Uḷḷiṭṭaṉa Oṟṟi Uṭaiya Accu muṉṟuṅkuṭuttu ṟakkālil yireṭṭippiṟkku mutu bhaṭṭasomayāsiyā
ṅkuṭuttu Immukkāl Accāluḷḷa palicaiyum Ivvaraikkāṇiyāluḷḷa Iṟaiyiliyuṅ koṇṭu Ittirunantāviḷakku
mpanāṭṭācāriyan Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 26.486 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
